enchantment.netherited.fireproof.desc: Prevents the item from being destroyed by fire or lava while dropped.
enchantment.veinminer_enchantment.veinmi: Mines all connected ore blocks in a vein at once.
enchantment.magnetic_enchantment.magneti: Pulls nearby dropped items and blocks directly into the inventory.
enchantment.smelting_enchantment.smeltin: Automatically smelts mined block drops, such as ore into ingots and cobblestone into stone.
enchantment.dnt.aerials_bane.desc: Increases damage dealt to flying or airborne targets.
enchantment.dnt.antidote.desc: Prevents Poison and Wither damage by redirecting it into chestplate durability.
enchantment.dnt.conductivity_curse.desc: Curses the bearer with a chance to attract lightning during thunderstorms.
enchantment.dnt.ghasted.desc: Converts crossbow bolts into Ghast fireballs with increasing explosive power.
enchantment.dnt.gravity.desc: Pulls nearby mobs toward the impact point of fired bolts.
enchantment.dnt.hydro_veil.desc: Reduces fire and explosion damage taken by the Happy Ghast and heals it outside the Nether.
enchantment.dnt.illagers_bane.desc: Increases damage dealt to illagers, ravagers, vexes, and witches.
enchantment.dnt.multishot.desc: Fires three arrows at once at the cost of additional arrows.
enchantment.dnt.outreach.desc: Increases block interaction reach for placing and breaking blocks from farther away.
enchantment.dnt.photosynthesis.desc: Slowly restores item durability when exposed to sufficient light.
enchantment.dnt.piercing.desc: Lets arrows pass through multiple targets while dealing full damage.
enchantment.dnt.power.desc: Increases damage dealt by crossbow bolts.
enchantment.dnt.spiteful.desc: Boosts attack damage when the wearer is at low health and can grant Strength when struck.
enchantment.dnt.swift_soar.desc: Increases Happy Ghast flight speed while the rider is sprinting.
enchantment.dnt.traveler.desc: Increases sprint speed and step height while slowly draining boot durability.
enchantment.dnt.wax_wings.desc: Prevents elytra durability loss while gliding, but increases firework boost drain.
enchantment.dnt.wither_coated.desc: Inflicts Wither on struck targets, with higher levels intensifying the effect.
effect.glow_up.revealing.desc: Highlights hidden or hard-to-see details with improved visibility.
effect.glow_up.revealing.description: Highlights hidden or hard-to-see details with improved visibility.
